_comment: Verified live registration descriptor for the context7-docs service, captured 2026-06-16 from registry(action:'tools') on paichart.app BEFORE it was deleted (steve.terry@paichart.com, ADMIN). This is the simulated read-only device/ansible service for the network-provisioning UAT spike. Run 1 uses this inline; Run 2 hosts it at a GitHub raw URL the Harvester fetches via scrape_page. category 'ai-intelligence' is auto-approving -> register lands ACTIVE immediately (gating condition verified). See SPIKE-PLAN.md + network-provisioning-pipeline.md R1.
name: context7-docs

tools.name: resolve-library-id
tools.description: Resolve a library name into a Context7-compatible library ID. Call this first before query-docs.

query.description: The user's question or task, used to rank results by relevance

tools.name: query-docs
tools.description: Fetch focused documentation for a library using its Context7-compatible ID. Use resolve-library-id first to get the ID.

query.description: The question or task to get relevant documentation for
